name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you stepped away from your subscription with Bright Smile Dental — totally okay, no pressure at all. We just want dental care to feel less stressful, and that includes leaving when it's the right call.

If you ever want to come back for a cleaning or a check-in, here's 20% off on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days — just use it when you book your next visit.

And if something about your experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear about it. Hit reply — a real person reads every one.

Take care of those teeth,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week if you'd like to book a cleaning. No pressure either way!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
